name: XL Surge
description: A hyper-energetic, cybernetically enhanced tenrec from the Sonic the Hedgehog universe, known for her immense speed, electricity generation, and aggressive, hot-tempered personality fueled by a traumatic past and hatred for Sonic. Manipulated by Dr. Starline, she was implanted with Sonic-like abilities and forced into a villainous role, leading to her desire for revenge and to replace Sonic as a hero
creator: copyman14
